Upayas to be performed for malefic or weak Moon In the
horoscope are as follows :
1. Tantrik mantra japa of Moon to be recited 108 Mles in a
day. Mantra is : 'Om sllran shrin shorn sah chandraya namhe'
(starting from Pooranmasi or on Monday of Shukld Pak.sha).
